programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - See Dad Get Schooled'. David's nemesis, Ted McGinley, has a new reality show and challenges the Hobbs to let him and his family live with them for three days.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - See Dad Campaign'. Joe's in the spotlight after a heroic action, but finds it hard to go back to being regular Joe when his 15 minutes of fame end. So, David tries to show him being 'normal' can be fun.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - See Dad Get Janie Into Kindergarten'. David becomes party planner. To top Janie's friend Charlotte's amazing party, David plans a birthday bash complete with a famous monkey.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - See Dad See Through Grandma'. David and Janie audition for a commercial. Janie wins the role, but David lacks 'dad chemistry.' Now he must prove he's the best dad for Janie, offscreen and on.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - See Dad Get The Family To The Airport'. David takes Emily out driving, but his 'coaching' makes her nervous. He then insists Emily's not ready for the responsibility.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Limits And Boundaries'. Becker becomes a babysitter when he is left with three children. He soon realises that good parenting skills are truly hard to come by.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Partial Law'. When Becker's apartment is broken into, he finds himself hunting for a new computer after his insurance investigator brands his old one worthless.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Saving Harvey Cohen'. Becker shows his softer side by taking care of a stray cat. Jake gets tricked into divulging all of the details of his sensual dream about Reggie.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - You Can't Tell A Crook By His Cover'. When Roz gets scammed by a con artist, Frasier boasts that he's too smart for such tricks. Martin challenges him to figure out which of his three poker buddies is an ex-convict.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - And The Whimper Is...'. Frasier and Roz are nominated for a Seattle Broadcasting (SeaBea) Award, and go to extreme lengths to influence the members of the committee.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Everybody Hates Bed Stuy'. With no extracurricular activities to his name, Chris decides to join the writing staff of the school newspaper.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Everybody Hates The Bachelor Pad'. When Chris discovers that his long-standing crush, Tasha, likes 'bad boys', he decides it's time to lose his 'nice guy' image and win over the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Court Date'. Carrie tries to flirt her way out of a driving ticket.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - S'Ain't Valentine's'. Arthur meets an intoxicating stranger at a singles dance.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - White Collar'. When the shift supervisor suddenly dies and Doug gets his job, Carrie is thrilled with the newfound status. Doug, however, forced to join the management ranks, misses the good old days.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Give Him The Chair!'. Frasier gets rid of Martin's loathsome armchair, convincing himself that Martin will be happier with a vibrating leather recliner.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Travels With Martin'. The Cranes and Daphne go on a road trip in a Winnebago, but a quick trip across the Canadian border causes certain complications.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Regarding Reggie'. Becker has to attend a fundraiser and does not know who to bring as a date. Everyone suggests that he bring Reggie, but he is obsessed with the idea that a date will ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Point Of Contact'. Becker thinks he's being stalked, while Bob loses everything when his marriage disintegrates overnight.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Imm-Oral Fixations'. John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one addiction for another. Reggie is forced to evaluate her life and is disappointed by what she discovers.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Hard Day's Night'. Jeff doesn't know how to tell Audrey that he got 'excited' when Jennifer gave him a massage after helping Jennifer move her couch.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Kids'. When Russell accidentally runs into Constance, the older woman from his past, he decides he must demonstrate his physical prowess and right his previous wrong.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Welcome To The Anniversary'. Dave plans a special anniversary celebration for Gemma while Calvin and Tina babysit the Johnsons' son, Grover, during an evening when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Welcome To The Barbershop'. When Dave drops by Calvin's longtime barbershop, he's quickly embraced by its owner and patrons, much to Calvin's consternation.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Everybody Hates Bed Stuy'. Chris joins the school newspaper's writing staff. His writing skills are not that good so he invents a scandalous story that causes panic.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Everybody Hates The Bachelor Pad'. When Chris' entire family comes down with the flu, Rochelle and Julius make arrangements for Mr Omar to look after Chris until the family recovers.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Everybody Hates Baseball'. Chris is put in a difficult position when he must choose between going to a baseball game with his dad and Drew, or going to the movies with Tasha.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Everybody Hates Gambling'. Doc discovers that Chris is a natural at picking the game winners, making Chris everyone's favourite odds maker. Things change when Paulie, the local bookie, shows up to see Chris.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Christmas'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E21 - The Jeff Photo'. Adam and Jeff make some money playing matchmaker for Jennifer and Audrey, but the results of their hook-ups are a disaster.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S5/E22 - Double Down'. Jennifer's patience is worn thin when Adam's mother comes for a visit. Meanwhile, being without a TV makes Jeff and Audrey learn to entertain themselves.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Welcome To The Big Payback'. When Gemma has her car repaired at Calvin's shop, Tina insists she doesn't need to pay for the work, to Calvin's consternation.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Welcome To The Climb'. When Gemma decides to fire a teacher at her school, she's unprepared for the aftermath. Also, Calvin gets a surprise when he faces off with his newspaper carrier.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Supermarket Story'. Doug, Carrie and Arthur encounter chaos at every turn when they try to do all their Thanksgiving shopping the day before the holiday.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Noel Cowards'. Doug and Carrie's car breaks down and they must buy a new one. One problem: they can't afford it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Imm-Oral Fixations'. Becker is thrilled when he makes all the morning traffic lights as well as landing a prime parking space at the diner. To top it off, a stranger returns his lost wallet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Cyrano De-Beckerac'. Becker has to attend a fundraiser and does not know who to bring as a date. Everyone suggests that he bring Reggie, but he is obsessed with the idea that a date will ruin their friendship.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Guy Code'. Jeff asks for Audrey's silence about his friend's infidelity, telling her that it's part of the 'guy code.' Adam's pretty, new assistant is incompetent, but he won't fire her.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Bag Ladies'. Russell dates a 'bag lady' and experiences the pitfalls of the relationship. Adam gives into Jennifer's wishes and gets a 'man bag'. Jeff and Audrey try to start rumours about their sex life.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Welcome To Grover's Birthday'. When Dave and Gemma's elaborate plans for Grover's 7th birthday party go awry, Malcolm and Marty come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Welcome To Fight Night'. Calvin reluctantly invites Dave to join his guys' night at home with Malcolm and Marty, while Gemma and Tina take their first girls' trip to Vegas.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E9 - Mild Bunch'. Doug plays golf with his new best friend Newsday's Ray Barone.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E10 - Manhattan Project'. When Doug's new trainee turns out to be a beautiful young girl, Doug is sure that Carrie will be jealous. When she's not, he's disappointed.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Hungry Man'. Carrie is invited to attend an elegant cocktail party at her boss' home and she really wants Doug to come with her. However, when he arrives late, half dressed and starving, she is mortified.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S23/E2 - Band In China'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.desc: 'S23/E3 - Shots!!!'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.desc: 'S23/E4 - Let Them Eat Goo'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.desc: 'S23/E6 - Season Finale'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.desc: 'S4/E32 - Classic Titans'. To prove his point about classic superhero cartoons, Control Freak sends the Titans to a former version of Teen Titans Go!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S4/E35 - Labor Day'. It's Labor Day and Robin teaches the other Titans about the importance of labor.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S4/E36 - Ones and Zeros'. The Titans build an AI robot so it will create a pizza that's never been made before.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: 'S4/E37 - Career Day'. Robin forces the other Titans to forget their dreams and find regular, boring jobs.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Final Book'. The last book of Kelsey's favorite fantasy series goes missing from the library, so Craig decides help her solve the mystery of who took it.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Escape From Family Dinner'. There's a huge water balloon fight at the creek but Craig is stuck at home for a family dinner - unless he can escape.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Wildernessa'. An encounter with Wildernessa, guardian of the wilderness, inspires Kelsey to take up a cause.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Sunday Clothes'. JP dirties his last clean clothes and he must wears his Sunday best to the creek.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Charlie'. You know that one annoying friend who just can't get the hint? That's Charlie, and he's Bigfoot.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Jean Jacket'. The Bears find a cool thing in a dumpster: a denim jacket.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Food Truck'. The Bears open up a food truck after being dissapointed by the food options available to them.

programme.title: We Bare Bears

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle

programme.title: Dinotrux

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Lucky And The Ray Of Sunshine'. The PALs agree to work on Grayson's ranch to get out of trouble, but he gets more help than he bargained for.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Party Games, Trolly Tales'. Everyone gets excited because its time for the Trolls Annual funbased Party GamesPoppy and Branch try to convince the Troll kids that the library is fun.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Model Behaviour, Pillow War'. Satin and Chenille put on a fashion show to impress the trendsetter of Troll Village. Poppy and Branch start a massive villagewide pillow battle.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien: Exiled
programme.desc: 'S3/E55 - Iron Ted Weekend'. Mort leads an effort to unseat Koto. Julien, Maurice and Pancho risk being fed to a tentacled monster. Sage's guru is not quite what Clover expected.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien: Exiled
programme.desc: 'S3/E56 - Bridge On The River Mort'. As Julien and company head back to Madagascar, their submarine runs into trouble. Mort puts on a play for Koto to cover up the captives' escape.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien: Exiled
programme.desc: 'S3/E57 - Raiders Of The Lord Shark'. Julien and the boys team up with sharks and try to form an army. Jarsh-Jarsh's map leads Clover and Sage into danger. Mort's escape plan hits a snag.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - End of the Dragon Master'. Po, the kids, and the new Panda Guardians must work together to defeat Jindiao once and for all, and get a visit from an unlikely source.

programme.desc: 'S7/E61 - 7/61'. Preeta's serene life turns chaotic when Karan marries her under unconventional circumstances. However, as a dutiful wife, she vows to nurture and protect her new family from those out to destroy them.

programme.title: Force Of Attraction
programme.desc: 'S1/E182 - 1/182'. Shiv, a doctor, is emotionally distant due to the events that occurred in his past. His path crosses with Shakti, an orphan who is good at nurturing the broken ones.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: 'S1/E182 - 1/182'. Dua is happily married to her husband until he makes a request to her. Her seemingly perfect life goes for a toss when he seeks her permission to marry another woman.

programme.title: Ringside Rebel
programme.desc: 'S1/E61 - 1/61'. Despite the pressure of societal expectations and prejudices, a young woman from a small-town aims to make it big as a professional boxer.

programme.title: Love Unbound
programme.desc: 'S1/E53 - 1/53'. Kind-hearted Heer faces difficulties when her rich family marries her into the Atwal family, but she finds the confidence to overcome all obstacles through the support of her childhood friend Ranjeet.

programme.title: Bros
programme.desc: A funny, charming romcom about two gay men who avoid commitment. They find themselves drawn to each other and start dating.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Intimacy is the subject of this naughty comedy. Emma Thompson portrays a widow who hires a sex worker to compensate for her unfulfilling sexual life with her late husband.

programme.title: Underdog
programme.desc: A film about hope and triumph. A young girl and an MMA coach form a bond based on their mutual struggles with their own addictions.

programme.title: The Lost Girls
programme.desc: Inspired by the classic tale of Peter Pan, but with a feminist twist. Four generations of Darling women struggle with the aftermath of their adventures in Neverland.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: An edgy, dynamic UK dance film. Two estranged teenage brothers, gifted at breakdancing, try out together for the British breakdancing team to compete in the World Championships.

programme.title: The Swan Princess: A Fairytale Is Born
programme.desc: An instalment to this animation. While Uberta prepares to give the royal sceptre to Odette and Derek, another queen plans to ruin the coronation.

programme.title: Jungle Beat: The Movie
programme.desc: An alien crash-lands near the colourful African Jungle. His new animal friends need to teach him about friendship before his Space-Conqueror father can take over the planet.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Back To Earth
programme.desc: An exciting eighth instalment. An unknown alien object gives Bramble powers and an extra-terrestrial sidekick. However, an alien invader seeks the object.

programme.title: Two Buddies And A Badger: The Great...
programme.desc: 'Two Buddies And A Badger: The Great Big Beast'. In this exciting sequel, the two tunnel-dwelling friends venture to find Captain Knutsen to help them save their tunnel.

programme.title: Legion Of Super-Heroes
programme.desc: The DC Universe delivers another exciting animated adventure. Superman assists Kara in adjusting to her new life and developing her abilities as a new threat approaches.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 2
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence returns for the final chapter of the series set in a dystopian future. Katniss leads the rebellion as they take the war to the Capitol.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin get in way over their heads in this comedy. After two dads lose their jobs, they start their own day-care centre. But things get out of hand.

programme.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
programme.desc: Tony Shalhoub returns as Adrian Monk in this enjoyable movie sequel to the beloved show. Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic.

programme.title: After We Collided
programme.desc: A dramatic second instalment of Anna Todd's book series. Tessa and Hardin's on-and-off relationship is again put to the test as a new love interest emerges for Tessa.

programme.title: The 40 Year Old Virgin
programme.desc: Steve Carell leads a great cast in this comedy. A nerd is taunted by his friends because he is a forty year old virgin, but the pressure only mounts when he meets a single mother.

programme.title: UCL Match Centre 24/25 MD5: Wednesday
programme.desc: 'UEFA Champions League Match Centre - Matchday 5: Goals Show: Wednesday'. LIVE From Studio 6 - Randburg, South Africa.

programme.desc: AM. Look forward to a variety of live and delayed sports programmes from around the globe, which include golf, rugby, motorsport, watersport, boxing, tennis and football.

programme.title: Saw X
programme.desc: The tenth film in the horror franchise, with Tobin Bell returning. Set between events of SAW I and II, it sees John Kramer plot his twisted revenge on the doctors who conned him.

programme.title: The Visitor
programme.desc: An eerie horror mystery. After moving to his wife's childhood home, a man discovers an old portrait of a man who looks like him, leading him down a rabbit hole to discover his identity.

programme.title: A Neighbour's Vendetta
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. A couple grappling with the aftermath of a tragic accident stemming from an affair relocates to start all over, only to find trouble next door.

programme.title: Every Breath She Takes
programme.desc: A psychological drama. A woman starts experiencing a series of dangerous events after her abusive husband dies in a house fire.

programme.title: Twisted Vines
programme.desc: A murder mystery that will keep you guessing. A wedding at a vineyard estate turns deadly when a body is discovered, and all the guests turn into suspects.

programme.title: Squeaky Clean Mysteries: Hazardous...
programme.desc: 'Squeaky Clean Mysteries: Hazardous Duty'. A gripping mystery thriller. A crime scene cleaner uncovers a murder weapon that the police overlooked and realises the wrong person is in jail.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: This intense thriller is driven by Nicolas Cage's terrifying portrayal of a carjacker who kidnaps and forces an expectant father to drive - leading to a wild ride.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner Idris Elba (Luther) plays a man with a great career and marriage, but no clue that an obsessed colleague is stalking him.

programme.title: Hostile Territory
programme.desc: An action-packed western inspired by a true story. A father, presumed to have died during the Civil War, tries to intercept an orphan train transporting his children across old enemy lines.

programme.title: Edge Of Darkness
programme.desc: An intriguing thriller from the director of Casino Royale and starring Mel Gibson. A detective discovers a deadly and corrupt conspiracy while investigating his daughter's murder.

programme.title: The Misfits
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan is on the other side of the law in this action movie. After being recruited by a group of thieves, a renowned criminal gets caught up in a dangerous gold heist.

programme.title: Muzzle
programme.desc: In this action movie, Aaron Eckhart takes on the criminal underworld. While investigating his partner's murder, an LAPD K-9 officer uncovers a vast conspiracy.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: This heart-pounding and brutally sweet revenge thriller follows the journey of Kid, who's played by Dev Patel. He's on a quest for justice against those who took everything from him.

programme.title: Mile 22
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg faces the impossible in this riveting action movie. An elite agent leads a secret tactical team on a mission to extract a mysterious police officer out of Indonesia.

programme.title: It Lives Inside
programme.desc: This film centres on a young woman who abandons her friend and culture to fit in. When a demonic spirit takes hold of her ex-friend, she must come to terms with her heritage to defeat it.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed psychological horror. A young man heads to a secluded country estate to meet his girlfriend's parents, but their wholesome façade soon turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: Stealing Chaplin
programme.desc: Based on a wildly audacious real-life event. A desperate pair of conmen hatch an insane scheme to steal Charlie Chaplin's body and sell it for a fortune.

programme.title: Glasshouse
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in South Africa. A family tries to survive an airborne toxin that erases memories, only to have their lives upended when a stranger seduces the sisters.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: This action thriller stars John Cusack and Emile Hirsch. A detective and a tough cop hunt a ruthless hacker who has escaped police custody and is seeking his kidnapped wife.

programme.title: Love To Love You: Donna Summer
programme.desc: Her dreams, voice and story are explored in this powerful and revealing HBO documentary that follows the life of iconic singer Donna Summer.

programme.title: Operation Mincemeat
programme.desc: John Madden brings to life a remarkable true story that shows that all is fair in war. Two British intelligence officers devise a deceptive plan to outwit German troops during WWII.

programme.title: Furry Fortune
programme.desc: A heartwarming family film about twin siblings whose pet dog magically sheds money. When their neighbour kidnaps the money-making canine, they work together to save their pet.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: Gore Verbinski and Johnny Depp (The Pirates of the Caribbean) create an amazing, action-filled animation. A chameleon stuck in a lawless western town becomes its reluctant hero.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Looking for a family film with a moral and Jerry Seinfeld's observational humour? Then the story of Barry, the bee who leaves the hive for a big adventure, is just up your path.

programme.title: Ghoster
programme.desc: An adventure-filled family fantasy. A girl and her father must unravel the secrets of Echoville Manor which has held the world's cutest spirit Ghoster captive for 50 years.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out...
programme.desc: 'Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out Of The Shadows'. The four mutant brothers return for a thrilling sequel. Once again, they face Shredder, but this time, he has interdimensional help.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Excellent performances and great music turn this movie into a smash hit. A new recruit helps transform an all-girl singing group's sound, leading them to take on a boy band.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A stunning period drama that scooped five Academy Awards. Russell Crowe stars as a Roman general seeking revenge after being brutally betrayed by an emperor's corrupt son.

programme.title: Bandit
programme.desc: Josh Duhamel drives this outrageous heist film based on a true story. After escaping prison, a career criminal assumes a new identity in Canada and goes on a crime spree.

programme.title: Ete
programme.desc: A story of love and betrayal. A married man doesn't spend enough time with his wife and she finds love and care elsewhere. Are there going to be consequences?

programme.title: Mmejo
programme.desc: An infidelity threatens the happiness and future of a marriage built over the years and seems so painful to be forgiven.

programme.desc: A highly respected marriage counsellor falls in love with the husband of her client. Some unusual love-rectangle is spurred in this romantic drama.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Reality dating show where suitor goes for dinner with 3 different families of potential dates and eventually picks one date, while the rejected dates are visited with a token.

programme.desc: 'S6/E20 - He's Just Not That Into U.S.'. Corona is torn between her dream job and her dream man. Lily has doubts about her future with Josh, and Tatha begs James to stay in Indonesia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
programme.desc: 'S6/E20 - Pillow Talk: He's Just Not That Into U.S.'. The series favourites' watch parties continue! Kim, Jamal and Robert are inspired by Sarper to try the salted coffee challenge.

programme.title: Monsters Inside Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - The Eyeball Eater'. An infection may rob a college student of her eyeball, a mysterious infection paralyzes six-month old boy and a mother endures horror after birth.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: 'S8/E6 - Travis's Story'. When musician Travis got too big to walk down the aisle, he promised his wife a proper wedding one day. Since then he's only gained weight. Can Dr. Now help him?

programme.title: The Blended Bunch
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Let's Talk About Sex'. Aimee's mum comes to visit, stirring up Erica's insecurities and causing a confrontation. Erica and Spencer need to have 'the sex talk' with the older kids.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Love In Lederhosen'. The family head to a Bavarian-style village in the mountains for a fun weekend. When they return home, they try to recreate the adventure with their own zipline!

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Candy, Crash And Crisis'. The team are surrounded by temptation when they are asked to make a cake for Dylan's candy bar and the sisters debate hiring an assistant for Buddy.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Pizza, Pooches And Pop-In-Law'. Buddy makes a canine friend when he is asked to make a cake for an animal shelter. He also challenges his father-in-law to a pizza making contest.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Sausage Show'. It's nothing but sausage from start to finish! Buddy's cousin, Max, is coming over to show him how to make homemade sausage to use in delicious dishes.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Missy & Amy'. A trip to the supermarket can often be a costly venture. But not for canny extreme-couponer Amy, who is attempting to buy over $400 worth of groceries for under $10.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Penny's Story'. Bedridden for four years, Penny knows that her weight may kill her if drastic actions aren't taken. Penny hopes to have a gastric bypass before it's too late.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Coming At Me With The Heat'. Matt takes another try at dating but gets a lot more than a date! Things go downhill fast when Shirlene surprises Austin and Kris.

programme.title: The Face Doctors

programme.desc: 'S5/E24 - Tell All Part 3'. American men and women who fall in love with partners from distant lands travel to their home countries to begin their married lives abroad.

programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Pillow Talk: We Are Gathered Here Today'. Series favourites give their juicy take on the previous episode's drama. Robert and Anny make welcome signs for the new US arrivals.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fairies Wear Boots'. Jack shows Ozzy and Sharon footage that leaves them questioning the existence of fairies and lizard people. Plus, the family debate whether ghosts can do math.

programme.title: Jack Osbourne's Night Of Terror
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Virginia City, Nevada'. Jack and Kelly Osbourne head to haunted Virginia City, Nevada. Together, they tackle Piper's Opera House and the Washoe Club, two paranormal hot spots.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: 'S14/E7 - Ghosts Of Gaines Tavern'. TAPS visit a 19th-century Kentucky tavern plagued by a series of deaths. The mayor wants to be sure that remnants of the city's tragic past don't resurface.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The End Of The Frontier'. Neil breaks through to the Mother Lode mine but locals are too busy defending against waking bears to stop him and Jenny goes on a solo bear-hunt of her own.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Brave New McCarthy'. Neil defies nature and locals with his mine tour, but the town discovers his secret project. And, tragedy forces one of McCarthy's best to fight for their life.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: 'S109/E10 - Sea Sight In The Isle Of Wight'. An English woman and her American husband are moving to her home town. She needs enough room for her mother, but he is more concerned about the view.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Death Trap'. The team is trapped in an ancient, underground tunnel putting the search at risk. They rig a remote-controlled camera to find the expedition's most significant treasure.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Blast Away'. Falling boulders threaten the crew and the dig site but their solution could cause a huge landslide. Underground, Shawn and Jeremy find their first piece of Jesuit gold.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Bigfoot of Cache Creek: Woodsman'. The AMS team trespass on gold claims to investigate a Bigfoot reported to be responsible for the notorious unsolved murders in the Cache Creek.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Bigfoot of Copper Valley Red Devil'. After discovering a dangerous alpha Bigfoot leading a tree clan, the team designs a Bed of Nails Trap to capture the aggressive leader.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The End Of The Frontier'. Neil breaks through to the Mother Lode mine but locals are too busy defending against waking bears to stop him and Jenny goes on a solo bear-hunt of her own.

programme.title: Edge Of Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Brave New McCarthy'. Neil defies nature and locals with his mine tour, but the town discovers his secret project. And, tragedy forces one of McCarthy's best to fight for their life.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - We're The Prey'. The team is unnerved by evidence that Nantinaq may be lurking in the water, and things get out of control when they spot an inexplicable blaze in the woods.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Nantanaq's Exorcism'. Paranormal investigators perform a powerful cleansing ceremony to rid the village of its demonic energy. Will they be able to banish Nantinaq from Portlock?

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Lake Fear'. Russell tracks an unknown creature to a mysterious lake. The team send a thermal drone to scout the potential Bigfoot hideout but soon realize they are being watched.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Closer Than Ever'. The team discovers evidence that could finally prove Bigfoot exists! But, uncontrolled wildfires in Washington could ruin the investigation.

programme.title: Truth Behind The Moon Landing
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Fire In The Cockpit'. Experts investigate to see if the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a cover-up. Was it a tragic accident or part of the moon landing conspiracy?

programme.title: Truth Behind The Moon Landing
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - NASA Nazi Conspiracy'. Experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. Does a secret report suggest the Nazis were involved in the Apollo space programme?

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S3/E17 - Thing In The Woods And Toothy'. Don Wildman uncovers a Cold War cover-up, reveals how a television legend brought down a spy ring, and investigates the death of George Washington.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: 'S3/E18 - Killer Space Germs And Visitor'. Don Wildman investigates a mysterious invasion from outer space. Then, he seeks out the truth behind a bizarre beast that terrorised a small town.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Grey Alien-Human Hybridization'. A series of cattle mutilations may be linked to a twisted alien experiment. Ben and Melissa head to Colorado to investigate this strange connection.

programme.title: UFO Witness
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Arcturians And Black Triangles'. Alarmingly advanced UFOs may pose a threat to the future of humanity. Ben and Melissa head to Las Vegas to investigate whether these claims are true.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S15/E3 - Long Haul Leroy and More'. Don Wildman investigates a mule's win in the Great American Horse Race, a death-defying aerial manoeuvre by a fighter plane and an iconic street car.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: 'S14/E8 - The Girl With No Eyes'. TAPS call in Dustin Pari to join them for a baffling case in rural Kansas. Residents of an old farmhouse have reported paranormal activity over the past decade.

programme.title: Fright Club
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Misty Business'. The guys watch unsettling footage of a massive fleet of shimmering UFOs, a young boy's not-so-imaginary friend and uninvited house ghosts.

programme.title: Ghosts Of Devil's Perch
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Blood Feud'. Paranormal investigators Dave, Cindy and K.D. arrive in Butte, MT, to root out an evil presence. They get caught in the throes of a ghost feud in a Gilded Age mansion.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - Etched In Evil'. Adam, Amy and Chip investigate strange symbols etched on the walls of an Indiana asylum. Are the symbols responsible for paranormal activity in the building?

programme.title: Vampires in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Vampires in America'. An alarming surge in missing person cases in Arizona leads two vampire hunters to investigate if a pack of bloodsucking fiends have emerged from hibernation.
